FinTech Systems Analyst

Rajesh Kumar Alagesan

Payments, Reconciliation, UAT and Operational Controls

FinTech systems professional with enterprise banking software experience at FIS and practical portfolio platforms covering payment reconciliation, exception investigation, UAT, control evidence and operational resilience.
